content: I will replace the AI tools toolbar section in `UniversalBlogEditor.tsx` to include the unified controls for AI content generation, URL source text fetching, and AI article recreation.

args.Description: "Implement the new AI control rows in UniversalBlogEditor.tsx, renaming AI 글 재창조 가동 to AI 글 재창조 시작, and styling all three main AI action buttons uniformly in size and color."
args.Instruction: "Replace the clean AI tools row (lines 1760 to 1931) with three distinct horizontal rows: AI 포스팅 글쓰기, AI 포스팅 재창조, and AI 수정보완. All three main buttons (AI 콘텐츠 생성 시작, URL 원본 글 가져오기, AI 글 재창조 시작) are styled identically in size (w-48 h-9) and premium gradient backgrounds (from-violet-600 via-indigo-600 to-fuchsia-600). The disabled states are relaxed so they stay active for new empty posts."
args.ReplacementContent:
" {/* AI 포스팅 글쓰기 가로 제어 바 */}
AI 포스팅 글쓰기
